ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., XGB, RF, SVM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the model is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the dataset is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the dataset */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the dataset */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC-AUC of the model on the dataset */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the dataset */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the performance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the performance entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the performance entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the performance entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the performance entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used in the password hashing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pipeline (e.g., training, deployed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pipeline was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the pipeline */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the pipeline */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the pipeline */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the pipeline is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_pipelines_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_pipelines_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "artifact_type" TEXT /* Type of artifact (e.g., model weights, training data) */,
  "artifact_path" TEXT /* Path to the artifact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the artifact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the artifact */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the artifact */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the artifact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the artifact is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_artifacts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of training */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the training entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the training entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the training entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the training entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the training entry is active */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_testing" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of testing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of testing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the testing entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the testing entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the testing entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the testing entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the testing entry is active */,
  "testing_status" TEXT /* Status of the testing (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_testing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_testing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "deployment_time" TEXT /* Time of deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the deployment entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the deployment entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the deployment entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the deployment entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the deployment entry is active */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time of change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
